query_normalized: dreamx-world 1.0: a general-purpose interactive world model computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (d) as it presents a foundational study on creating multimodal interactive agents within a virtual environment using imitation and self-supervised learning, which directly addresses the core mechanism of "interactive world models" and "general-purpose agents" central to the user's question.
